ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signal_controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of control parameters */,
  "gain_index" INTEGER /* Index for the gain level applied to the signal */,
  "fe_control_word" INTEGER /* Control word for front-end signal processing */,
  "tia_control" INTEGER /* Control parameter for total ionospheric absorption compensation */,
  "adc_control" INTEGER /* Control parameter for analog-to-digital conversion */,
  "ext_control" INTEGER /* Control parameter for external system interactions */,
  "phase_offset" INTEGER /* Phase offset adjustment for signal synchronization */,
  "digital_gain" INTEGER /* Digital gain adjustment for signal amplification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the control parameters were configured */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location where the control parameters are applied */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the configuration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_controls_adc_control FOREIGN KEY ("adc_control") REFERENCES adc_controls ("adc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_controls_tia_control FOREIGN KEY ("tia_control") REFERENCES tia_controls ("tia_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_controls_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_controls_phase_offset FOREIGN KEY ("phase_offset") REFERENCES phase_offsets ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_controls_ext_control FOREIGN KEY ("ext_control") REFERENCES ext_controls ("ext_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_controls_fe_control_word FOREIGN KEY ("fe_control_word") REFERENCES front_end_controls ("fe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_controls_gain_index FOREIGN KEY ("gain_index") REFERENCES gain_levels ("gain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gain_levels" (
  "gain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gain level */,
  "gain_value" INTEGER /* Value of the gain applied */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gain level */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value for the gain level */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value for the gain level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gain level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the gain level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "front_end_controls" (
  "fe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each front-end control set */,
  "control_word" INTEGER /* Control word for front-end signal processing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the front-end control */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value for the front-end control word */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value for the front-end control word */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the control word was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the control word */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tia_controls" (
  "tia_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TIA control set */,
  "control_value" INTEGER /* Control value for TIA compensation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TIA control */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value for the TIA control */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value for the TIA control */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the TIA control was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the TIA control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tia_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adc_controls" (
  "adc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ADC control set */,
  "control_value" INTEGER /* Control value for ADC conversion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ADC control */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value for the ADC control */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value for the ADC control */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the ADC control was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the ADC control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ext_controls" (
  "ext_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external control set */,
  "control_value" INTEGER /* Control value for external interactions */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external control */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value for the external control */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value for the external control */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the external control was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the external control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ext_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phase_offsets" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase offset */,
  "offset_value" INTEGER /* Value of the phase offset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase offset */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value for the phase offset */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value for the phase offset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the phase offset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the phase offset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
